## Script
Which script? (e.g. code-server)

## Proxmox version
Output of:
`pveversion -v`

## What happened?
Paste the relevant output/logs.

## Expected behavior
What did you expect to happen?

## Extra context
Storage types, network setup, etc. (no secrets)
